<p><em>I fix things. And I make things.</em></p>

<br>

<p>
  Building <a href="https://github.com/coroboros"><b>Coroboros</b></a> — infrastructure for temporal coherence.<br/>
  Systems that collapse divergent branches into stable, deterministic signal.
</p>
